findings.evidence: Lines 181-187 prove the theorem by `simp only [map_add, LinearMap.add_apply]`, `rw [P.intersectionForm_isSymm.eq y x]`, and `ring`; Mathlib already has the nearby generic symmetric bilinear polarization API at `Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/BilinearForm/Properties.lean:138` (`IsSymm.polarization`).
findings.fix: State the no-division expansion as a generic lemma for any symmetric `LinearMap.BilinForm` over the appropriate ring/semiring, then derive the plumbing wrapper from `P.intersectionForm_isSymm`.
findings.issue: `intersectionForm_self_add` is over-specialized to `PlumbingGraph`; the proof uses only bilinearity and symmetry of a bilinear form, not the plumbing matrix or lattice coordinates.

summary: One exported helper is still stated at plumbing level even though it is only a generic symmetric-bilinear-form identity.
